targets.query:
from(bucket: "raw_bucket")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "raw_measurement" and r._field == "quality")
  |> duplicate(column: "_value", as: "quality")
  |> group(columns: ["quality"])
  |> count()
  |> group()
  |> rename(columns: { _value: "count" })
  |> sort(columns: ["count"], desc: true)

from(bucket: "raw_bucket")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "raw_measurement" and r._field == "quality")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value != "good")
  |> group(columns: ["siteId", "assetId", "tagName"])
  |> count()
  |> group()
  |> rename(columns: { _value: "bad_count" })
  |> sort(columns: ["bad_count"], desc: true)

panels.title: Non-good readings by signal (empty = all good)
